title: geum macrosepalum
intro: Geum macrosepalum, also known as the Korean avens, is a flowering plant species native to China, Japan, and Korea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Geum macrosepalum include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism and respiratory problems. Geum macrosepalum is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and can also be used topically as a poultice or ointment.
